articles.title: GRADUATE FROM PROMPTS TO AGENTS WITH GALE
articles.summary: Is it time for your GenAI program to level up?

articles.title: 👀 Get an inside look of GALE
AMAZON AGI
articles.summary: The Adept team and Pieter Abbeel have formed a new lab within Amazon to work on AGI goals. They will continue training language models and multimodal models and work towards integrating them into AWS products.

articles.title: OPENAI MAKES CANVAS AVAILABLE TO EVERYONE
articles.summary: Canvas, OpenAI's editing tool originally introduced in October, is now available to everyone. It now supports getting feedback and editing in the form of comments.

articles.title: YELP ADDS AI-POWERED REVIEW INSIGHTS TO RESTAURANTS
articles.summary: Yelp's latest updates bring AI-powered features like Review Insights to help users explore businesses more effectively. The platform also enhances discovery tools, simplifies connecting with service providers, and introduces AI-driven ad optimization to benefit business owners.

articles.title: AN EVOLVED UNIVERSAL TRANSFORMER MEMORY
articles.summary: Sakana AI has developed a new transferable memory module that works by compressing attention information and transferring it between models. It slightly improves performance on some long context benchmarks.

articles.title: [MASK] IS ALL YOU NEED
articles.summary: Another step towards the unification of autoregressive modeling and flow-based methods for the generation of new data. This work uses Masking over discrete data as its generative objective. The results are compelling, although only on smaller-scale datasets.

articles.title: REDUCING HALLUCINATION WITH DROPOUT DECODING
articles.summary: Dropout Decoding is a method that improves large vision-language models by reducing errors like object hallucinations in multimodal tasks.

articles.title: 3 STEPS TO GET STARTED WITH MULTI-AGENT SYSTEMS
articles.summary: LLMs excel at handling simple, well-defined tasks, but workflows often demand more than isolated outputs. By connecting multiple AI agents that represent various processes within an organization, you can create systems that collaborate across domains and automate complex workflows seamlessly. Explore how to build a multi-agent system [12], and see an agent network in action with Cognizant Neuro AI [12].

articles.title: AWESOME OPEN SOURCE LLMS
articles.summary: OLMo and Friends of OLMo models that are completely open. This list includes data, training code, and model weights.

articles.title: FLOW MATCHING TUTORIAL CODE
articles.summary: Facebook Research has released a comprehensive tutorial and code for flow matching, which was used in its Meta Movie Gen work. It covers all the mathematics and algorithmic complexities of the field for anyone looking to quickly get up to speed.

articles.title: EMOV2: A LIGHTWEIGHT AI MODEL
articles.summary: EMOv2 is a new lightweight model design optimized for mobile and bandwidth-efficient applications.

articles.title: LATE TAKES ON OPENAI O1
articles.summary: OpenAI's o1 model, believed to be a post-trained version of GPT-4o, focuses on leveraging increased test-time computation to improve performance in complex domains like math and coding. This approach encourages the model to use more tokens for internal processing, enhancing reasoning capabilities at the cost of slower response times. While o1 showcases potential benefits, particularly in fields requiring deep thought, it also raises concerns about alignment and interpretability due to its reliance on RL and search methods.

articles.title: GROWL IS AN AI INTERACTIVE BOXING COACH TO PUNCH UP YOUR FAMILY WORKOUTS
articles.summary: Growl has raised $4.75 million to develop an AI-powered interactive boxing coach designed for at-home family workouts. Utilizing advanced AI, multi-camera 3D motion tracking, and edge computing, Growl delivers real-time, personalized fitness guidance. The system combines immersive technology with gaming experiences, offering a comprehensive workout across various fitness levels and types.

articles.title: ANDROID'S LATEST ROUND OF AI FEATURES IMPROVE ACCESSIBILITY, FILE SHARING, AND MORE
articles.summary: Google has introduced new AI features for Android, including Expressive Captions that add emotional context to transcriptions and enhanced Image Q&A, which leverages the Gemini 1.5 Pro model for detailed image descriptions. Gemini integrates better with popular apps and offers personalized responses and auto-enhancements in Google Drive scanned documents. Updates also include improved file sharing with QR codes and enhancements to the Pixel Screenshots app.

articles.title: LIVE WEBINAR: GENERATE CHUNKED, VECTORIZED JSON FROM ANY DOCUMENT TYPE
articles.summary: Learn to build accurate ETL pipelines for RAG using Unstructured + Ragas in minutes. Register to join us on Wednesday, December 18th, or sign up to get the recording. [19]

articles.title: OPENAI LAUNCHES FULL O1 MODEL WITH IMAGE UPLOADS AND ANALYSIS, DEBUTS CHATGPT PRO
articles.summary: OpenAI has launched its o1 model, enhancing ChatGPT with image analysis capabilities.

articles.title: COPILOT VISION, MICROSOFT'S AI TOOL THAT CAN READ YOUR SCREEN, LAUNCHES IN PREVIEW
articles.summary: Microsoft has introduced Copilot Vision, an AI tool in Edge that reads and responds to questions about websites users visit.

articles.title: PERPLEXITY EXPANDS ITS PUBLISHER PROGRAM
articles.summary: Perplexity, an AI-powered search engine, is expanding its publisher program, allowing news outlets like LA Times and Adweek to share ad revenue.
